frameworks.name: predictive processing
frameworks.one_line: deep cortical layers carry perceptual hypotheses combined with sensory input

frameworks.name: laminar cortical computation
frameworks.one_line: different V1 layers carry distinct expectation vs feedforward signals

core_question: Which cortical layers of V1 carry stimulus-specific activity evoked by prior expectations?
key_assumptions: prior expectations modulate early sensory processing
cortical layers have distinct intra- and interregional connectivity
laminar BOLD at 7T can dissociate deep vs superficial V1 signals
manipulations: presence vs absence of stimulus-specific prior expectation
readout across V1 cortical depth (deep vs superficial layers)
key_findings: prior expectations evoke stimulus-specific activity in V1
this expectation-driven activity is selective to deep V1 layers
interpretations: deep-layer neurons represent perceptual hypotheses, consistent with predictive processing
